name: Gestrinone
description: Gestrinone, also known as ethylnorgestrienone, is a synthetic steroid of the 19-nortestosterone group that is marketed in Europe, Australia, and Latin America, though not the United States or Canada, and is used primarily in the treatment of endometriosis.

interactions.name: Capromab pendetide
interactions.description: Gestrinone may decrease effectiveness of Capromab pendetide as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Ulipristal
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Gestrinone can be decreased when used in combination with Ulipristal.

interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Lepirudin can be decreased when used in combination with Gestrinone.
